title: Maharashtra weather update: Heatwave grips Vidarbha region; Brahmapuri, Gondia cross 42 degrees Celsius mark - Mid-day
full_text:
Maharashtra weather update: Heatwave grips Vidarbha region; Brahmapuri, Gondia cross 42 degrees Celsius mark
In Vidarbha, heat conditions remained severe, with Brahmapuri emerging as the hottest in the state at 42.2 degrees Celsius, followed closely by Gondia at 42.0 degrees Celsius
Maharashtra continues to experience a mix of intense heat in Vidarbha. File Pic/ Ashish Raje
Maharashtra continued to witness a sharp contrast in weather conditions on Tuesday with intense heat prevailing in several regions while hill stations remained comparatively cool, according to IMD data.
Vidarbha reels under severe heat
In Vidarbha, heat conditions remained severe, with Brahmapuri emerging as the hottest in the state at 42.2 degrees Celsius, followed closely by Gondia at 42.0 degrees Celsius.
